mapper.sql: refund_id, refund_no, after_sale_id, after_sale_no, user_id, order_id, order_no, refund_amount, refund_status, refund_channel, idempotency_key, callback_payload, fail_reason, success_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into beyeah_mall_refund
refund_no, after_sale_id, after_sale_no, user_id, order_id, order_no, refund_amount, refund_status, refund_channel, idempotency_key, callback_payload, fail_reason, success_time, create_time, update_time,
#{refundNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterSaleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{afterSaleNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refundStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{refundChannel,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callbackPayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{successTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: select from beyeah_mall_refund where refund_id = #{refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1
select from beyeah_mall_refund where after_sale_id = #{afterSaleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1
select from beyeah_mall_refund where idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
